scripts.dev:full: npm run kill:ports && npm run dev:micro
scripts.services: concurrently "tsx watch --ignore \"*.db\" --ignore \"*.db-journal\" --ignore \"*.db-wal\" --ignore \"*.db-shm\" services/auth-service.ts" "tsx watch --ignore \"*.db\" --ignore \"*.db-journal\" --ignore \"*.db-wal\" --ignore \"*.db-shm\" services/leads-service.ts" "tsx watch --ignore \"*.db\" --ignore \"*.db-journal\" --ignore \"*.db-wal\" --ignore \"*.db-shm\" services/campaigns-service.ts" "tsx watch --ignore \"*.db\" --ignore \"*.db-journal\" --ignore \"*.db-wal\" --ignore \"*.db-shm\" services/automations-service.ts" "tsx watch --ignore \"*.db\" --ignore \"*.db-journal\" --ignore \"*.db-wal\" --ignore \"*.db-shm\" services/notifications-service.ts" "tsx watch --ignore \"*.db\" --ignore \"*.db-journal\" --ignore \"*.db-wal\" --ignore \"*.db-shm\" services/ai-service.ts" "tsx watch --ignore \"*.db\" --ignore \"*.db-journal\" --ignore \"*.db-wal\" --ignore \"*.db-shm\" services/settings-service.ts" "tsx watch --ignore \"*.db\" --ignore \"*.db-journal\" --ignore \"*.db-wal\" --ignore \"*.db-shm\" services/dashboard-service.ts"
scripts.dev:micro: concurrently "npm run services" "npm run gateway" "npm run dev"
scripts.start:micro: NODE_ENV=production concurrently "npm run services" "npm run gateway"
